MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bryn Davies for Petitioner.

Ms. Davies explained that there was a delay in obtaining documents, and stated that the accounting petition was now prepared and ready to be filed. Status on filing of the accounting petition was continued to January 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-23-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bryn Davies for Julie Coyle.

The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order). The Court also directed Counsel to file a new trust petition with a probate case number and raised the issue of venue. Status of filing the petition for change of venue was set for May 11, 2011 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
